scripts.prod: npm run preflight && rm -rf .next && BROMETAL_SOURCE=npm node scripts/generate-version.mjs && BROMETAL_SOURCE=npm next build && next start -p 3005
scripts.vercel-build: npm run build --prefix ../brometal && npm run preflight && node ../brometal/dist/cli/index.js prod . && rm -rf .next && BROMETAL_SOURCE=npm node scripts/generate-version.mjs && BROMETAL_SOURCE=npm next build
